title: Failed to run 'make run-docker-py-tests'
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

/kind feature

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. make all

2. make run-docker-py-tests and select an image


**Describe the results you received:**
```
[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# git rev-parse HEAD
4e1bcf30f3a519490f58d66bc0aef16676f61ae8

[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# make run-docker-py-tests
./bin/podman run --rm --security-opt label=disable --privileged -v /tmp/tmp.5iQOaMj5lu:/testLogs --net=host -e DOCKER_HOST=tcp://localhost:8080  sh -c "pytest  "
✔ registry.access.redhat.com/sh:latest
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/sh:latest...
  name unknown: Repo not found
Error: Error initializing source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/sh:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/sh: name unknown: Repo not found
make: *** [Makefile:258: run-docker-py-tests] Error 125

[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# ./bin/podman login registry.redhat.io
Username: XXX
Password:
Login Succeeded!

[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# make run-docker-py-tests
./bin/podman run --rm --security-opt label=disable --privileged -v /tmp/tmp.zEhftbfat3:/testLogs --net=host -e DOCKER_HOST=tcp://localhost:8080  sh -c "pytest  "
✔ registry.redhat.io/sh:latest
Trying to pull registry.redhat.io/sh:latest...
WARN[0004] failed, retrying in 1s ... (1/3). Error: Error initializing source docker://registry.redhat.io/sh:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.redhat.io/sh: unknown: Not Found
WARN[0009] failed, retrying in 2s ... (2/3). Error: Error initializing source docker://registry.redhat.io/sh:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.redhat.io/sh: unknown: Not Found
WARN[0016] failed, retrying in 4s ... (3/3). Error: Error initializing source docker://registry.redhat.io/sh:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.redhat.io/sh: unknown: Not Found
^Cmake: *** [Makefile:258: run-docker-py-tests] Error 1

[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# make run-docker-py-tests
./bin/podman run --rm --security-opt label=disable --privileged -v /tmp/tmp.QsxZn2UjTC:/testLogs --net=host -e DOCKER_HOST=tcp://localhost:8080  sh -c "pytest  "
✔ docker.io/library/sh:latest
Trying to pull docker.io/library/sh:latest...
  denied: requested access to the resource is denied
Error: Error initializing source docker://sh:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/sh: errors:
denied: requested access to the resource is denied
unauthorized: authentication required

make: *** [Makefile:258: run-docker-py-tests] Error 125
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
fix image path

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
[root@kvm-04-guest06 podman]# ./bin/podman version
```

```
4e1bcf30f3a519490f58d66bc0aef16676f61ae8
```

comments.body:
The `run-docker-py-tests` target requires setting `$DOCKERPY_IMAGES` and `$DOCKERPY_TEST` environment variables. There is no indication of what those should be.

The `run-docker-py-tests` target was added in #4832. Although that PR is owned by @baude, that particular commit (d924494f5) was by @jwhonce. It looks like those environment variables are part of his local setup, but (according to `git log -S`) were never made part of the source tree nor documented anywhere.

I have assigned this to @jwhonce. Jhon: if this is a target that should be used by others, could you please submit a PR documenting those envariables and perhaps setting them to a default value? If this target should not be used by others, could you please remove it? Thanks.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I believe @jwhonce is working on this now.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I cannot reproduce (anymore), so I am closing.
